# Copilot Instructions for Onboarding-Engine

When the user asks how to use custom setup, show the repo customization index and provide invocation examples.

Discovery behavior:

- Mention that custom agents can be invoked with @agent-name.
- Mention that skills can be auto-selected by request intent and can also be explicitly requested by name.
- Suggest using /onboarding-tools-help for a quick command reference.

If the user request maps clearly to one agent, suggest that exact @mention before proceeding.
